---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**What feature would you like to see?**


**What problem does this solve?**


---

## Use Case

**Describe your use case:**

**Example scenario:**
1. As a [role]
2. I want to [action]
3. So that [benefit]

---

## Proposed Solution

**How do you envision this working?**


**Example (if applicable):**
```
[Code example, command, or interaction]
```

---

## Alternatives Considered

**What alternatives have you considered?**


**Why is the proposed solution better?**


---

## Impact

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Solo developers
- [ ] Small teams (2-10 devs)
- [ ] Large teams (10+ devs)
- [ ] Open source maintainers
- [ ] Specific tech stack (which one?)

**Priority (from your perspective):**
- [ ] Critical (blocking my work)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor enhancement)

---

## Additional Context

**Screenshots, mockups, or examples:**


**Related issues or discussions:**


---

## Checklist

Before submitting, please check:
- [ ] I searched existing issues/discussions (this hasn't been requested)
- [ ] I described the problem this solves
- [ ] I provided a use case
- [ ] I considered alternatives
